strengths: Hands-on experience contributing to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing direct exposure to the technical domain.
Proven high-performance distributed systems background at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby — low-latency microservices at millions of requests per second aligns with real-time inference requirements.
Long polyglot, full-stack track record across event-driven architectures, embedded systems, and open-source platforms demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals.
concerns: Currently an individual contributor (Staff/Senior Developer); the role demands 5+ years of senior technical leadership, with no CTO, VP Engineering, or equivalent executive tenure on record.
No demonstrated experience scaling or managing engineering organizations — no evidence of team-building, architectural governance, or developing a technical leadership layer.
Fintech-infrastructure depth is minimal: one brief IC role at RIDE Capital with no credit systems, working-capital, or payment-flow exposure relevant to the core business domain.
response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled, experienced individual contributor with a credible polyglot distributed-systems background and emerging agentic-AI tooling exposure, but he does not meet the hard requirements for this CTO role: there is no record of executive or senior technical leadership, no team-scaling experience, no production multi-agent system ownership, and negligible fintech-infrastructure depth. The gap between his current seniority level and the role's demands is structural rather than marginal.
